text:
There once was a girl named Holly. Holly loved to sing as she drifted off to sleep each night. One night, as she drifted asleep, she sang a melody that she'd heard somewhere long ago. She dreamed she was a brave little mouse living in a moonlit garden. She sang the song every night, and each time it woke her up singing too.

Years later, Holly met a poet. They fell in love. He noticed how entrancing her singing voice was. Whenever they would speak, her words would weave into songs she imagined singing. They began writing songs together, mixing her dreams with poetry.

Even into her old age, Holly would put on a little performance for her cats. They'd purr along, enjoying the sweet melodies she'd conjured.

And that was the story – just a tiny mouse who dreamt big and sang her heart out.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
